meaning: adj.圣母马利亚的 对圣母马利亚特别虔诚的
examples: The South Sudanese athlete Gour Marial says he has been suspended from his country's athletic federation in a dispute of founding.
"I'm hoping they will at least see me run in the Olympics, " Marial said last month.
But for Marial, completing the race was as good as winning.
Marial, 28, pounded his way around the 26.2-mile course in 2:19:32.
